title: Former Premier League referee gives verdict on controversial England penalty in Euro - Sports Castle
context: A challenge inside the penalty area. Does this deserve a spot kick?
explanation: The incident occurred when Harry Kane was clipped by Denzel Dumfries, leading to a VAR review and the referee, Felix Zwayer, awarding a penalty. The decision was heavily criticized by former Premier League referee Keith Hackett, who argued that VAR's intervention was incorrect and that both players were simply going for the ball.

title: Gerard Martín Red Card Cancelled After VAR | Barcelona Vs Atletico Madrid 2-1| Laliga 2026
context: A challenge that had the referee reaching for a card. Red or yellow?
